form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by half a length at Ballarat (22.63) beating Dream Lucky in a Rank Limit - Grade 7 on April 11. Has ability and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by half a length at Ballarat (22.63) beating Dream Lucky in a Rank Limit - Grade 7 on April 11. Has ability and worth including.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Crossed out soon after start and raced wide in back straight.

form.formComment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 4 length sixth (24.50) over 425m at Bendigo. Not likely to feature on this occasion.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when second behind Sailor Song at Geelong last start over 400m (22.78). Good beginner who shouldn't be far away in the run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved sharply when second behind Sailor Song at Geelong last start over 400m (22.78). Good beginner who shouldn't be far away in the run.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early split and led throughout to score when a 1.5 lengths winner (24.24) over 425m at Bendigo. Has run a slick time here with a 22.2 PB at the distance. Worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early split and led throughout to score when a 1.5 lengths winner (24.24) over 425m at Bendigo. Has run a slick time here with a 22.2 PB at the distance. Worth including.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 390m at this track clocking 22.68. Boxed on well to finish runner-up at the latest run. Leading player.

formComments.comment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 390m at this track clocking 22.68. Boxed on well to finish runner-up at the latest run. Leading player.

form.formComment: Produced a good run, hitting the frame last run (22.81) at this track in a Rank Limit - Grade 7. Has first look at box 6 this time. Has the ability and looks a key chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Produced a good run, hitting the frame last run (22.81) at this track in a Rank Limit - Grade 7. Has first look at box 6 this time. Has the ability and looks a key chance.

form.formComment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors three starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when second (24.15) at Bendigo over 425m. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (22.89) over 400m at Maitland. Jumps from the outside. Looking to others.
